name: Your Business Pros Inc
description_short: Business Pros Inc offers creative business financing solutions including merchant cash advances, working capital loans, and specialty financing for established and startup businesses.
description_long:
Business Pros Inc is a business financing company that positions itself as a comprehensive financial partner for entrepreneurs at various business stages. The company emphasizes personalized, non-cookie-cutter financing solutions and claims to have trained personnel experienced in structuring business finances.

The company offers a diverse range of financing products across multiple categories: traditional working capital loans (up to $2 million with 24-month terms, fundable in 48 hours with no collateral required), merchant cash advances, asset-based financing, invoice factoring, equipment financing, and purchase order financing. They also provide specialty financing including commercial real estate, e-commerce, franchise, SBA loans, startup financing, and real estate-related products like construction and church financing. Services extend beyond lending to include business credit analysis, mentorship programs, and help with business structure determination.

The company differentiates itself through emphasis on personal consultation, flexible repayment options (daily, weekly, or monthly), rapid funding timelines, and willingness to work with businesses at early or growth stages. They market themselves as understanding that capital access is critical for turning business visions into reality and position their personnel as experienced in custom solution design.

However, the website lacks specific details about lending criteria, actual APR/cost information, typical approval times, or customer reviews. The broad service offerings lack detailed explanation of terms, rates, or real qualification requirements. No information is provided about company history, licensing, regulatory compliance, or verification of claims about personnel qualifications.
address: 1100 Peachtree St NE Suite 200, Atlanta, GA 30309

company_info.headquarters: 1100 Peachtree St NE Suite 200, Atlanta, GA 30309

pros: Working capital loans available up to $2 million with 24-month terms
No collateral or personal guarantee required for working capital financing
Fast funding advertised at 48 hours from application for working capital products
Flexible repayment options (daily, weekly, or monthly automatic withdrawals)
Comprehensive range of specialty financing products beyond basic loans
Offers business mentorship and credit analysis services in addition to financing
Free initial consultation offered for prospective clients
cons: Website provides no specific information about interest rates, APR, or actual cost of borrowing
No customer testimonials, reviews, or verification of success stories provided
Vague service descriptions lack detail on eligibility requirements or qualification criteria
No information about company history, licensing status, or regulatory registrations
Extremely broad product offerings may indicate unfocused business model or unverified capabilities
best_for: Established small to medium businesses needing working capital for operational expenses
Business owners seeking fast access to funding without collateral requirements
Entrepreneurs at startup or early growth stages looking for mentorship alongside financing
diagnosis: Business Pros Inc is positioned for established and growing businesses needing quick access to working capital or specialized financing without collateral, particularly those valuing personalized consultation. The primary caveat is the complete absence of pricing transparency, customer verification, or regulatory information—interested applicants should independently verify licensing and obtain specific rate quotes before proceeding.
services: Working capital loans (up to $2 million, 24-month terms)
